text:
Ickshonpe Katocha (イックションペ＝カットゥーチャ, Ikkushonpe Kattūcha) is a Single-Star Hacker Hunter. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 31, Chapter 326 

Appearance

Ickshonpe is a slim man that wears a wide variety of colored clothing. He's seen wearing blue pants, a purple long sleeve shirt, and yellow gloves. He is seemingly always wearing what appears to be a white-colored panda-shaped mask with light cyan ears, large, cartoonish eyes, sharp serrated teeth, and a red dot on its forehead with the characters "Pe" in it.

Personality

Not much is known about Ickshonpe's personality other than he never speaks and has only communicated using written statements. He is uninterested in what happens outside of the net, which he claims not to be his world, displaying a considerable degree of alienation from reality. 

Background

He is claimed to be a resident of the "digital world". Based on his number of votes despite expressing no interest in being chairman, it is presumable that he is well-liked in the Hunter Association.

Plot

13 th Hunter Chairman Election arc

Ickshonpe secures enough votes during the first round and second rounds of the 13 th Hunter Chairman Election to place 3 rd both rounds Hunter × Hunter - Volume 30, Chapter 320 Hunter × Hunter - Volume 31, Chapter 321 and place 4 th in the third round. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 31, Chapter 323 Despite personally abstaining from voting, he still places 6 th in the fourth round, becoming one of the top sixteen candidates of the round and advancing to the fifth round. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 31, Chapter 325 He places 5 th in the fifth round, becoming one of the top eight candidates of the round and advancing to the sixth round. In the sixth round, he places 8 th with zero votes, but a revote of that round is held because the required conditions were not met. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 31, Chapter 329 In the seventh round, Ickshonpe ties with Botobai for 7 th place with zero votes and is eliminated from the Chairman race, with only the top four being able to advance to the next round. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 31, Chapter 330 

At the beginning of the eighth round, he gives a speech stating that he doesn't care about the election as it's not his reality and asks Ging if he would like to trade the "White Spear of Glory" for the "Holy Golden Flag", implying that he knows Ging. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 32, Chapter 331 

Election Standing

Abilities & Powers

Ickshonpe has all the benefits granted by his status as a Hunter.

Nen

As a Pro-Hunter, Ickshonpe is capable of using Nen. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 7, Chapter 60 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

His name is a corruption of "Escape", both a computer key and his behavior towards reality.
Ickshonpe is speculated to stand for the "I" in Greed Island's title. First, the Spell Card Shop in Masadora bears his mask's likeness. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 15, Chapter 151 In addition to his status as a Hacker Hunter and his belief that everyone else's world is not his reality, he knows Ging personally and asks if he wants to trade the "White Spear of Glory" for the "Holy Golden Flag", both of which could be game-related items.
